steps.title: Define the term
steps.content: The previous sentence says the 424 BCE eclipse was annular. The next sentence explains that an annular eclipse occurs when the Moon does not cover the Sun completely and creates a ring of fire.

steps.title: Use a clarification signal
steps.content: A suggests simultaneous events, C introduces an example, and D signals contrast. The transition should introduce a definition or restatement of annular. The answer is B.
